title: bidens andicola
intro: Bidens andicola, also known as the Andean beggarticks, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Bidens andicola include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion for internal use, or as a topical application for wounds and skin conditions.
